title: Simple UI
description: A minimalistic GUI resource pack that offers clean, smooth textures for a streamlined Minecrafting experience.
body:
**Simple UI is a resource pack for Minecraft 1.20.2 that changes the look of the GUI's to be both simple and clean. There are three variants being White, Red, and Blue, but more may come in the future. This resource pack WILL not work below Minecraft 1.20.2 as it uses the new resource pack format. No texture mods needed.**

Here is a preview of some of the GUI's using the red variant;
# The Disconnect Screen
![The Disconnect Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3zQsHgzP/images/fab1e420235abf0ea0df42f35764255ab710ea5d.gif)
# The Hotbar
![The Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3zQsHgzP/images/b4cdbce859fd840b68cd5ea0cfcf613002ac8190.png)
# The Survival Inventory
![The Survival Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3zQsHgzP/images/0aa7c96bc3a63500104caeda7653256d008ad2d1.png)
# The Creative Inventory
![The Creative Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3zQsHgzP/images/0b0f8b78162d0c96fdee2d682a5ab50fda6dba1d.png)
